title: Good quality Full OP
wikitext:
[]: Good quality Full OP?             Quote Post by Seph » Sat Oct 02, 2010 5:03 am Found this on Youtube a few days ago, and I was wondering whether there is a torrent or something with a DVD-quality version?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Oct 02, 2010 5:25 am The "full" opening is a fan-made MAD/AMV afaik. I mean, there are spoilers everywhere. I don´t think you could get a high-res version of it anywhere. Your best bet would be downloading the youtube video.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Oct 02, 2010 5:52 am Actually, this looks to me like the OP that was included with the Japanese "Test Type" Renewal DVD several years ago. It was mostly a demo of what the Renewal video quality would be, and was labeled as disc 0. I don't think the US Platinum release included it, but I could be wrong. I haven't seen it in years, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Sat Oct 02, 2010 6:59 am drinian is correct that is the full opening video from the Test Type DVD released in Japan to show off the remastered version of episode 1, the US platinum release didn't have it so the only way was to get the Test Type DVD (which I did & didn't regret one bit). Yes there's spoilers everywhere in it but they probably thought that by that point anyone looking to get it to see how good the remastering was had already seen the series & film anyway, handily this means the lack of subtitles on the DVD was no obstacle for me.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Oct 02, 2010 8:00 am Eva Monkey has a pretty good copy up over on his old omake page .

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Oct 02, 2010 10:27 am Reichu wrote: The Test-Type DVD was released to promote the upcoming Renewal DVD-Box, in containing the remastered episode 01, along with "music videos" edited by Masayuki going along with the full-length versions of "Zankoku na tenshi no teeze" and "Fly Me to the Moon".

[]:             Quote Post by Seph » Sat Oct 02, 2010 2:37 pm Thanks a lot guys, and especially to Eva Monkey for hosting the downloads. Though if anyone would be willing to upload the DVD ISO somewhere and shoot me a link, I'd be very grateful. I'd be even more grateful if someone knew a place they still sold it though :(

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Oct 02, 2010 2:49 pm Seph wrote: Thanks a lot guys, and especially to Eva Monkey for hosting the downloads. Though if anyone would be willing to upload the DVD ISO somewhere and shoot me a link, I'd be very grateful. I'd be even more grateful if someone knew a place they still sold it though :(

[]:             Quote Post by Seph » Sun Oct 03, 2010 3:20 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I think you'll be hard pressed to find someone to provide you with an ISO. No copies on eBay, but readily available for the same amount from both Play Asia and CD Japan. Take your pick. It'll run you $18 plus shipping, but at least it's not too outrageously priced. http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-a7-49-en-70-67t.html http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KIBA-1000
